evidence: "A true classic! This is one of the best and funniest movies of all time."
"A classic! I have seen this movie many times and it never gets old."
"A great series to watch, lots of side stories and plots."
"A cute movie, I watched it many times with my son when he was younger."
"A great show! Obviously the consultants are real SF because this is pretty close to the real thing."
"The bottom line is that it was the quintessential rock show!"
"It's good if you want to hear all about Jon."
"I hate to say it, but Tommy needs to grow up."
"Sorry kids....REO isn't REO without Gary Richrath."
"Vince didn't take care of his voice or learn to sing properly."
"The stage was fantastic, lots of pyro, the backup singers/dancers actually sang rather than be eye candy for the show."
"I used to run the VCR through the stereo before surround sound was the in-thing and it sounded great."
"I was able to relate to it in most aspects."
"A much better time in life to have been a teen...no cell phones or texting..."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and classic films, often appreciating their entertainment value. They prefer straightforward narratives with fast pacing, while showing a moderate sensitivity to production quality and emotional resonance.
